comment: Published lyrics from DuBose Heyward. D-minor centred recitative aria (Serena). No chord-row labels in published score -- spurious pipeline chords wiped. Partial coverage: measures where pipeline lost notes entirely (m8 stairs., m21 prayers., m35 to de prom-ise land., m48 man., m68 dead.) are unfixable by truth overlay and omitted.

7.comment: Pipeline had 5 notes with 0 lyrics. Published: 'foot-steps climb-ing up de' continues from m6 'foot'.

29.comment: Pipeline had 4 notes with 0 lyrics. Published: 'Ain' dat I min'' (Animato section).

39.comment: Pipeline dropped 'all' -- published: 'march-in' all de way'.

47.comment: Pipeline had 'Since I lose' (missing 'my') + spurious A major chord. No chords in published score.

59.comment: Pipeline OCR read 'by...' and 'bed' -- published: 'by' and 'bed.' (period).

61.comment: Pipeline OCR garbled 'Tell-in'' as 'Tell i in'' (extra token). Published: 'Tell-in' me de'.

73.comment: Spurious A major + A minor chords. No chords in published score.

74.comment: Pipeline had phantom 'all' before 'is'. Published: held note from m73 then 'is'.

76.comment: Pipeline read stage direction 'CHORUS' as a lyric. Not a sung word.

77.comment: Spurious Bb minor chord. No chords in published score.

83.comment: Spurious C chord. No chords in published score.

85.comment: Pipeline read 'Ah! freely' -- 'freely' is stage direction '(SERENA freely)', not a lyric.
